arts.ttl: PSG and Liverpool join Cherki chase
arts.sum: Since he was 16, the attacking midfielder was considered one of the most promising players in European football and, after several seasons of inconsistent form, with a failed transfer in the summer, the performance of the France Under-21 international has attracted the interest of major European clubs, including PSG and Liverpool . As Foot-Mercato reports, both clubs are targeting the talented Olympique Lyon player, who was provisionally relegated to the second division in November by the DNCG and is in dire need of selling their best assets to raise the 100 million euros required by the financial body to confirm their relegation.
